name: Baked Tofu Nuggets
recipeIngredient: 1 block Mori-Nu lowfat silken tofu (1% fat)
2 tablespoons low sodium soy sauce or tamari
cayenne pepper to taste (optional but adds a great kick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tofu into 1/4 inch thick slabs.
2. Place the tofu slabs in a plastic bag and pour the soy sauce and water over them. Seal the bag and place it in the refrigerator. Allow to marinate for several hours or overnight, turning occasionally.
3. Mix together the nutritional yeast, parsley, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, pepper, and cayenne pepper (if using) in a shallow plate.
4. Coat the marinated tofu cubes evenly with the mixture.
5. Lightly spray a cookie sheet with cooking spray and place the coated tofu cubes on the tray.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F for 30-45 minutes, or until lightly browned. Cook longer if you prefer a denser texture, or cook less for a lighter, more cheesy texture.
7. These make great sandwich fillings and serve 2-4 people.
